description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash careMachine wash separately in cold water Use mild detergent Do not bleach Avoid soaking Remove promptly Line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroideryRelive those fun rainy evenings when you spent time playing knots and crosses with your friends and cousins, drawing them on walls with red brick or chalk. Bring back those memories by getting your little one into this graphic t-shirt from tantra and teach him those evergreen childhood games. The cotton fabric will keep the young one dry and comfortable at all times while he enjoys a brain teasing game with his friends. Pair it with cute crocs footwear and colourful jibbitz for that comfortable touch to your little one's outfit.
